response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with roughly 15 years of development experience and a genuine developer-tooling bent (test runners, CI infrastructure, Selenium training, MCP code generators), but this is a Level II people-management role requiring 2+ years of people management and 3+ years in a technical leadership role, neither of which appears anywhere in his history. His mobile-platform exposure is a single 2015-2016 iOS/Apple TV stint, and there is no evidence of roadmap ownership, performance management, or leading organizational change. He would be a credible senior/staff IC candidate, but not a fit for this management opening.
strengths: 15+ years of broad engineering experience spanning web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Hands-on developer-tools and testing-infrastructure work: test frameworks (Trial, Fluent-Asserts), CI/CD setup, device orchestration tooling, and AI-agent developer tooling at his current role
Demonstrated mentoring and teaching aptitude through workshops, a multi-module Selenium course, and conference talks
concerns: No people-management experience; every role listed is an individual-contributor position
No formal technical leadership track record (team lead, roadmap ownership, or organizational change), all of which are explicit requirements
Mobile-platform knowledge is thin and dated relative to a role centered on a major mobile ecosystem

key_factors.factor: Developer tools and testing infrastructure background
